ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path of the audio file */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio file in seconds */,
  "ground_truth" TEXT /* Ground truth transcription for the audio file */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file (e.g., WAV, FLAC, MP3) */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the audio file was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the audio file */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used to process the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcriptions" (
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated audio file */,
  "greedy_output" TEXT /* Output transcription from the greedy algorithm */,
  "beamsearch_output" TEXT /* Output transcription from the beam search algorithm */,
  "transcription_date" TEXT /* Date and time the transcription was generated */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the transcription model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., greedy, beam search) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "wer" REAL /* Word error rate (WER) of the model */,
  "cer" REAL /* Character error rate (CER) of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated audio file */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the audio file */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the audio file version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Update date of the audio file version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the model (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated audio file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the associated user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the audio file (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_user_access_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)
